hook.text: The #MeToo movement exposed what HR departments knew but rarely addressed: harassment was systemic, not isolated.

buildup.text: Sexual harassment includes unwelcome conduct—verbal, physical, or visual—that creates a hostile work environment.

discovery.text: Two legal types: quid pro quo (favors for advancement) and hostile environment (pervasive offensive behavior).

twist.text: Employers are liable even when they don't know—if they should have known and failed to prevent or correct it.

climax.text: Prevention requires clear policies, training, accessible reporting channels, and leaders who take every complaint seriously.

punchline.text: Harassment policies mean nothing without enforcement. Culture is the real policy.

quiz.question: What are the two legal types of sexual harassment?
options: Quid pro quo and hostile environment
